messages.content:
Generate exactly 40 Indian lacto-ovo vegetarian recipes in valid JSON format for a family of 9. Output ONLY raw JSON (no markdown, no code fences).

STRICT RULES:
- Lacto-ovo vegetarian (eggs OK, no meat/fish)
- NO soy products (tofu, soy sauce, edamame, tempeh)
- NO wheat flour (maida forbidden). Besan (chickpea flour) OK, Atta (whole wheat flour) OK.
- Indian cuisine only
- meal_type distribution: about 13 breakfast, 13 lunch, 14 dinner recipes
- All servings: 9 (for a family of 9)
- Difficulty mix: easy, medium, hard
- Common ingredients allowed: toor dal, masoor dal, chana dal, rajma, chole (chickpeas), palak, paneer, eggs, rice, atta, vegetables, yogurt, milk, peanuts, cashews, ghee, oil, spices

Each recipe JSON object must have these exact fields:
- id: integer 1-40
- name: authentic Indian dish name
- description: 1-2 sentence description
- ingredients: array of {name: string, amount: number, unit: string} - realistic amounts for 9 servings
- instructions: step-by-step cooking instructions as a single string
- tags: {cuisine: "indian", meal_type: "breakfast" or "lunch" or "dinner", dietary_tags: ["vegetarian", "lacto-ovo"]}
- servings: 9
- prep_time_min: number
- cook_time_min: number
- difficulty: "easy" or "medium" or "hard"
- source_url: ""

Output ONLY this JSON structure (no markdown): {"recipes": [...]}
